import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

import '__SCREEN_NAME___effect_state.dart';
import '__SCREEN_NAME___screen_state.dart';

class __ScreenName__Provider extends ChangeNotifier {
  __ScreenName__ScreenState _state = const __ScreenName__InitialScreenState();
  __ScreenName__EffectState? _effect;

  __ScreenName__ScreenState get state => _state;
  __ScreenName__EffectState? get effect => _effect;

  Future<void> load() async {
    _state = const __ScreenName__LoadingScreenState();
    notifyListeners();

    try {
      await Future<void>.delayed(const Duration(milliseconds: 300));
      _state = const __ScreenName__LoadedScreenState(
        title: '__ScreenName__ loaded',
      );
    } catch (e) {
      _state = __ScreenName__ErrorScreenState(message: e.toString());
      _effect = __ScreenName__ShowErrorEffect(message: e.toString());
    }

    notifyListeners();
  }

  void consumeEffect() {
    _effect = null;
    notifyListeners();
  }
}
